clusters.justification: These terms share neuroimaging co-activation within limbic and anterior salience networks, reflecting the broad macroscopic functional domain of emotional reactivity, mood, and valence.
These terms consistently recruit mesolimbic and frontostriatal circuitry, representing the overarching cognitive axis of encoding subjective utility to guide motivated behavior and choice.

Consistently mapped onto the default mode network, these terms represent the overarching cognitive domain of processing internally generated, abstract representations of the self, others, and personal narratives.
